title: Bat War
original_title: ศึกค้างคาวกินกล้วย
overview: Colonel Phao is assigned to lead a force to sweep and close down all unauthorized Thai music schools, including the school of Khao, who had created a grudge in Colonel Phao's heart when he was a child.
